name: Mukhyamantri Yuva Swarozgar Yojana, Uttar Pradesh
administered_by: Department of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, Government of Uttar Pradesh
retrieval_text: The UP Mukhyamantri Yuva Swarozgar Yojana provides bank-linked financial assistance to educated unemployed youth aged 18-40 in Uttar Pradesh to set up self-employment enterprises. Maximum project cost is Rs 25 lakh for manufacturing and Rs 10 lakh for the service sector. A margin money subsidy of 25% of the total project cost is provided by the state government, with SC/ST and women entrepreneurs receiving 25% reservation under the scheme. Projects costing less than Rs 4 lakh do not require collateral. The applicant must be a permanent resident of UP, must not have defaulted on any prior bank loan, and must not have previously availed similar central or state self-employment benefits. Apply at msme.up.gov.in.
